title: Orban's Hungarian government accused of mass voter intimidation ahead of election
summary_full: A film quoting voters, mayors and a police officer alleges money and drugs are being offered to pressure people to back the ruling party.
summary_public: A film quoting voters, mayors and a police officer alleges money and drugs are being offered to pressure people to back the ruling party.

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: Hungarian government accused of mass voter intimidation
